text: Did you see the Higashiyama tourist surge report? Toshio was saying foot traffic past his studio doubled this month — not sure if that's hopeful or alarming for the neighborhood.
Alarming, honestly. My supplier says delivery trucks can't get through Sanjo before noon now. Beautiful problem to have, I suppose.
Exactly. Though Shibui says summer inquiries are up — so I'll take the congestion as a trade.
Small mercies 😄 Let me know if you fire next week — I want to see how those wood-ash pieces came out.
